fields.label: Room Type
fields.description: The room type category for which inventory is being blocked. All rooms of this type within the hotel's available pool are protected up to the blocked quantity.

fields.label: Blocked Qty
fields.description: Number of rooms of this type to hold for this group reservation. Availability is reduced by this quantity for the parent reservation's check-in to check-out period.

fields.label: Rate Code
fields.description: Contracted rate code for rooms picked up from this block. When set, the rate from this code overrides the default tariff during room pickup.

fields.label: Picked Up
fields.description: Number of rooms already assigned (picked up) from this block into the parent reservation's Rooms table. Computed by the system on save.

fields.label: Remaining
fields.description: Quantity minus picked_up. Represents how many rooms of this type can still be added without exceeding the block.

fields.label: Pickup Deadline
fields.description: Optional last date by which rooms must be picked up from this block. Rooms not picked up by this date will be auto-released to general inventory (v2 feature).

fields.label: Notes
fields.description: Internal notes for this block (e.g. contracted rate details, special arrangements).
